name: Stuffed Cucumbers
recipeIngredient: 1 slice Pork or chicken (2 x 4 inches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and prepare ingredients. Mince shrimp, meat, water chestnuts, and onion together in a small bowl. Add salt, pepper, egg, and corn starch to the mixture. Slice cucumbers into 1/2-inch slices. Remove seeds from cucumber cavity, leaving a slight bit at the bottom to form a hollow for holding filling. Fill cucumbers.
2. Place oil in wok and heat to smoking point. Reduce heat to medium dial. Carefully place stuffed cucumber slices in wok with filling side up. Add 3 tablespoons water, cover wok, and steam ingredients for 25 minutes. Check periodically to ensure there is enough moisture left for steaming; if not, add more water.
3. At the end of 25 minutes, check to see if pork is cooked through and cucumber slices are tender. If not, cook slightly longer. Remove cucumbers to a platter. Dripping soya sauce over slices if desired.
NOTE: This is a beautiful party dish. Arrange stuffed cucumbers in a heat-proof dish and steam in a steamer if desired.
